title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Arena Animation Capital India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Arena Animation Capital India:
Arena Animation Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation Capital India!
